---
title: "star_trek"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

computer_raw <- read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/master/data/2021/2021-08-17/computer.csv")

computer_raw %>% 
  distinct(value_id, .keep_all = TRUE) %>% 
  count(char_type)
```

```{r}
library(tidytext)
library(tidylo)



```

```{r}

```
